hypothesis: If a small language model is continually pre-trained on MOF-focused literature and broad chemical corpora and then fine-tuned to map MOFid text representations to properties, then it will predict MOF band gaps and gas adsorption with lower MAE than CGCNN/SOAP/MOFormer and maintain superior accuracy in low-data regimes, because the pre-training embeds transferable chemical structure–property knowledge that compensates for the absence of 3D structural inputs.
